name: Healthcare FHIR MCP
description: FHIR R4 healthcare data server with care-based safety validation. Connects to any FHIR R4-compliant server. Requires FHIR_SERVER_URL env var. AI-generated clinical data is validated against physiological safety ranges.

tools.name: search_patients
tools.description: Search for patients on the FHIR server by name, date of birth, or identifier.

tools.name: get_patient
tools.description: Get a full patient record by FHIR resource ID. Returns demographics,

tools.name: search_conditions
tools.description: Find diagnoses and conditions for a patient. Clinical status can be

tools.name: search_medications
tools.description: Find medication requests (prescriptions) for a patient. Status can be

tools.name: search_observations
tools.description: Find lab results, vital signs, and other observations for a patient.

tools.name: create_observation
tools.description: Record a new observation (vital sign, lab result) for a patient.

tools.name: get_care_plan

tools.name: validate_resource
tools.description: Validate a FHIR resource against the R4 specification. Accepts a JSON string
